articles.title: 100 Days Into the Iran War, Trump Fails to Rally US Support
bullets: Sunday marks 100 days of the US-Israel war against Iran, still overwhelmingly unpopular domestically.
Polls show most Americans opposed bombing Iran before it started and support hasn't improved since.
Experts warn lack of public backing could weaken Trump politically heading into midterms.

articles.title: Pentagon Raises Israel Espionage Threat to 'Critical' Level
bullets: DIA reports Israel stepped up efforts to eavesdrop on senior US officials, including top Iran negotiator Steve Witkoff.
Counterintelligence threat level from Israel raised from 'high' to 'critical' — the top tier.
Israel reportedly intercepting communications from Pentagon policy chief Elbridge Colby and deputies.

articles.title: Foreign Businesses Flee Cuba as Economy Collapses Under Trump Pressure
bullets: Mastercard and Visa suspended transactions by non-US foreign visitors in Cuba starting Saturday.
Spanish hotel giants Iberostar and Meliá each giving up management of at least a dozen Cuban hotels.
Major airlines canceled Cuba flights due to jet-fuel shortages; Canadian miner Sherritt suspended operations.

articles.title: Xavier Becerra Clinches Top Spot on California Governor's Ballot
bullets: Former HHS Secretary Becerra topped the California gubernatorial primary ballot heading to November.
California race is one of the most watched 2026 gubernatorial contests nationally.
Race seen as a key test of Democratic Party strength in the post-Biden era.

articles.title: Trump May Appear on New $250 Bill in Latest Break With US Tradition
bullets: Republicans are pushing legislation to put President Trump's face on a new $250 denomination bill.
Move is part of a broader effort to stamp Trump's personal image on national institutions.
Critics call it an unprecedented departure from the tradition of putting deceased figures on currency.

articles.title: Ukraine Drones Strike St. Petersburg Naval Bases in Second Wave Attack
bullets: Hundreds of Ukrainian drones targeted Russian naval arsenals and Kronstadt naval base near St. Petersburg.
One person killed, oil depot set ablaze; Russia briefly closed maritime access to Kronstadt.
Wider drone attacks also hit oil infrastructure in Krasnodar Krai in southern Russia.

articles.title: Iranian Missiles Target Kuwait and Bahrain After US-Iran Clash Escalates
bullets: Iran fired missiles at US-allied Gulf states Kuwait and Bahrain following exchange of strikes with US forces.
Pope Leo XIV declared the Iran war does not qualify as a 'just war' under Catholic teaching.
UN reports 1.4 million people need humanitarian aid in Lebanon amid ongoing Israeli attacks.

articles.title: Peru Holds Presidential Election Amid Polarized Race Between Fujimori and Sánchez
bullets: Peruvians voted Sunday in a tight presidential race between hard-right Keiko Fujimori and leftist Roberto Sánchez.
Polls showed a highly polarized electorate with no clear frontrunner in final days.
Outcome will shape Peru's economic and foreign policy direction for the next five years.

articles.title: Armenia Votes in Pivotal Election Deciding EU vs Russia Alignment
bullets: Armenians headed to polls Sunday with both the EU and US backing PM Pashinyan's pro-Western drive.
Russia applied economic and political pressure on Yerevan to keep Armenia within its orbit.
Result will define Armenia's geopolitical trajectory as Russia-West competition intensifies in the Caucasus.

articles.title: Spearfisherman Killed by 15-Foot Shark in Third Fatal Attack in Under a Month
bullets: A 35-year-old spearfisherman was killed off Western Australia by a suspected 15-foot great white shark.
The attack is the third fatal shark incident in the region in less than a month.
Authorities have closed nearby beaches and launched an investigation into the surge of attacks.

articles.title: Modi Paradox: Political Dominance Alongside Worsening Economic Slide
bullets: BJP now rules 21 states covering ~75% of India's population, its strongest position since 2019.
Economy faces rising inflation, rupee weakness, and WPI inflation above 8% in April 2026.
Private investment declining; growth driven mostly by debt-financed public spending.

articles.title: LPG Prices Hiked Across India on June 7; Delhi, Mumbai Among Cities Affected
bullets: Cooking gas cylinder prices revised upward today in Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Chennai, and Bangalore.
The hike follows earlier fuel and diesel price increases that pushed industrial costs higher.
Secondary inflation effects from fuel costs are expected to drive WPI higher in coming weeks.

articles.title: 'I'm a Cockroach': Gen Z Protest Movement Reaches Indian Capital
bullets: A viral Gen Z protest movement using the 'cockroach' identity has spread from social media to Delhi streets.
Demonstrators say they embrace the label as resilience against economic hardship and political apathy.
Movement mirrors similar youth protest waves seen recently in Kenya and Bangladesh.

articles.title: 14 States Under Thunderstorm Alert as Pre-Monsoon Intensifies Across North India
bullets: IMD issued thunderstorm and lightning alerts for Delhi-NCR, UP, Uttarakhand, Punjab, Haryana, and Rajasthan.
Winds expected to reach 60–80 km/h in affected areas; risk of waterlogging and power outages.
Southwest Monsoon advancing toward southern and central India ahead of normal schedule.

articles.title: Southwest Monsoon Advances Toward Central India Ahead of Schedule
bullets: IMD confirmed the monsoon is progressing into southern and central India with widespread rainfall expected.
Mumbai, Hyderabad, and Chennai all seeing elevated temperatures before monsoon arrival.
Early arrival forecast to benefit kharif crop sowing season and ease reservoir levels in affected states.

articles.title: Nasdaq Plunges 4.18% in Worst Market Day of the Year as AI Stocks Crash
bullets: Nasdaq fell 4.18% to 25,709, S&P 500 dropped 2.64% to 7,383, Dow lost 695 points on Friday.
Sell-off driven by violent collapse in chip and AI stocks on disappointing guidance.
CNN/CNBC called it the market's worst single-day performance since October 2025.

articles.title: Strong Jobs Report Sparks Fed Rate-Hike Fears, Triggering Market Selloff
bullets: May jobs report showed 172,000 new jobs added — roughly double analyst expectations.
Unemployment held at 4.3%; markets reacted in 'good news is bad news' fashion on rate hike fears.
10-year Treasury yield surged to 4.54% and 2-year jumped to 4.16% immediately after the report.

articles.title: Nvidia -6.2%, Broadcom -7.9%, Micron -13.3% as Chip Stocks Lead Market Rout
bullets: Nvidia fell 6.2% and Broadcom dropped 7.9% after Broadcom failed to raise its AI chip revenue outlook.
Micron Technology slid 13.3%, the steepest single-day drop among large-cap semiconductor names.
The AI chip group's losses dragged the broader Nasdaq into its worst session of 2026.

articles.title: Treasury Yields Spike After Jobs Data; 10-Year Hits 4.54%
bullets: 10-year Treasury yield jumped from 4.50% to 4.54% and 2-year spiked from 4.04% to 4.16% post-report.
Rising yields reflect growing market conviction that the Fed will hike rates at least once in 2026.
New Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh is scheduled to speak publicly on June 17, his first major policy signal.

articles.title: Apple Bucks Selloff, Climbs 0.5% as WWDC 2026 Kicks Off Monday
bullets: Apple rose 0.5% Friday, remaining near all-time highs, as investors await Monday's WWDC keynote.
Market expects Apple to unveil a major AI-powered Siri overhaul and new iOS 27 at the conference.
CVS Health also rose after announcing it will cover Eli Lilly's Zepbound weight-loss injectable.

articles.title: Apple WWDC 2026 Opens Monday: Major Siri AI Overhaul and iOS 27 Expected
bullets: Apple's Worldwide Developers Conference keynote begins June 8 at 10am PT with major AI announcements.
Siri to be overhauled using Google's Gemini technology for contextual, multi-step task handling.
iOS 27, macOS 27, and an AI agent integration with the App Store also expected at the event.

articles.title: SpaceX IPO Roadshow Underway; $75B Raise Would Be Largest IPO in History
bullets: SpaceX investor roadshow launched June 4; pricing set for June 11, trading on Nasdaq (SPCX) June 12.
Company targeting $75B raise at ~$1.75T valuation, surpassing Saudi Aramco's 2019 record IPO.
30% of float routed directly to retail investors via Robinhood, Fidelity, and Charles Schwab.

articles.title: Anthropic Files Confidential IPO Paperwork at $965B Valuation
bullets: Anthropic filed a confidential draft S-1 with the SEC on June 1, 2026, starting the formal IPO clock.
Revenue run-rate hit approximately $47B in May 2026, up ~5x year-over-year.
Post-money valuation stands at $965B following the $65B Series H; trillion-dollar listing seen as likely.

articles.title: CVS to Cover Eli Lilly's Zepbound Weight-Loss Drug, Boosting Lilly Shares
bullets: CVS Health announced it will cover Lilly's Zepbound injectable weight-loss medication for plan members.
CVS also resumed coverage of Lilly's newer weight-loss pill, expanding access to GLP-1 treatments.
Eli Lilly shares rose on the news, extending its outperformance in the healthcare sector this year.

articles.title: New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh to Deliver First Major Policy Signal on June 17
bullets: Fed Chairman Kevin Warsh is scheduled to speak publicly on June 17 — his first major podium appearance.
Markets will watch closely for signals on rate policy after Friday's stronger-than-expected jobs data.
Wall Street pricing in rising odds of at least one Fed rate hike before end of 2026.

articles.title: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Dreaming V3: AI Memory That Updates Itself Automatically
bullets: Dreaming V3 runs background memory synthesis after conversations, automatically updating user context.
5x more compute-efficient than prior memory system; rolling out to Plus/Pro users in US from June 4.
Privacy researchers flag concerns: 96% of ChatGPT memories in a study were created unilaterally by the system.

articles.title: NVIDIA Unveils RTX Spark Superchip at Computex, Targets Intel and AMD Laptops
bullets: RTX Spark is an Arm-based chip integrating AI agents, gaming, and content creation for Windows laptops.
Adobe is rebuilding Photoshop and Premiere Pro natively for the RTX Spark architecture.
Consumer laptops expected in autumn 2026; AMD, Intel, and Qualcomm shares fell on the announcement.

articles.title: Congress Drops 269-Page 'Great American AI Act' with 3-Year State Law Preemption
bullets: Bipartisan bill from Reps. Obernolte and Trahan would freeze all state AI laws for three years.
Requires companies with $500M+ revenue to publish AI governance frameworks and report safety incidents.
Labor unions including AFL-CIO rejected the bill, calling it 'a giveaway to the AI industry.'

articles.title: Microsoft Unveils 7 Proprietary MAI Models at Build 2026, Reducing OpenAI Dependence
bullets: Microsoft launched MAI-Thinking-1, MAI-Code-1-Flash, MAI-Image-2.5, MAI-Transcribe-1.5, and MAI-Voice-2.
MAI-Transcribe-1.5 beats OpenAI and Gemini transcription models across 43 languages at 5x faster speed.
Move positions Microsoft's Copilot as a model-agnostic platform independent of OpenAI's roadmap.

articles.title: Apple WWDC 2026: Siri Gets Gemini AI Upgrade, iOS 27 and App Store AI Agents Unveiled
bullets: Siri to gain conversational, multi-step task handling powered by Google Gemini integration.
AI agents in the App Store will let users delegate tasks like booking reservations and editing documents.
New Visual Intelligence camera mode, intelligent photo editing, and automatic object removal also expected.
